textByHash.0c486b1f89f7723be05819b37756c6cfdd62a6dc: The sheep? But...They just wander around in this field all day. Trust us, we know.
textByHash.16374a6a29020b6fa874d31d49d2fc9f4c5b2299: When you try and go through a guard will stop you and ask for the password.
textByHash.18d8a5e12624c1691a78e53a10f73f0228b55fdc: What do you think you are doing? You're going to blow our cover. Get away.
textByHash.198a69059c3f3ccdf2aa1784232e39f7b848a40b: How goes it, blade of grass? I'm glad you're not any thinner You should invite your friends around So I can have my dinner!
textByHash.28c58d0d8e123a46d22dbe5d3c024b299494e750: Oh no! Cow's not talking to me!
textByHash.3b0c71092628b75f01501fd47b2829d5afc83199: This is an amazing revelation. We must include it in our report. Thank you, we'll mention your bravery.
textByHash.4d76394cec82d9384cd0aaa631ae4cb586986f15: We can't get any news in this field! All these humans keep trying to shear us!
textByHash.4f36dba9df1767f7dd6bb6be706e24f3cab3f6bc: Well I thought it was funny.
textByHash.526fbbbe4ce97d34fb767cce4bf013a403bc2dbf: The password is cabbage. Don't forget it.
textByHash.5332854ebe93a383fb1da591ac9d4de975e4b9ae: What do you think you are doing? You can't even get the greeting right.
textByHash.54841ac39d60e0908b034eb10a844db0873731b4: Do I look like I care?
textByHash.5abfed6d90202db579ba704eaaf1b3ea1838c2f8: The human found some symbols And doesn't know what they mean So now it's cross-examining me And spoiling my routine!
textByHash.6e6b497b98dc4b1d2dfee15750e5386af9e2c2f1: Hello, I've just finished composing my latest poem. Would you like to hear it?
textByHash.7016e9e03dd42495107a9dc65489b37e8be028e0: Huh, the cow's right. You humans have absolutely no understanding of art!
textByHash.720087c59e5283bc447d2637cb5a00ee6b4fe500: What do you mean 'How to get to the outpost'? Any intelligent penguin knows that.
textByHash.73970ddccf8dee350a9368d6e4c8b39da7b14dc5: You have a good point. Yes, we must warn Pescaling Pax of this new threat. We'll put it in the report and you can give it to them.
textByHash.848c64ceee773f7f218ff7797c43907113693d94: We think the Farmer may be an agent for the other side, trying to have us assassinated by all these foolish humans. If you investigate him for us, we can finish our mission report and you can go on your way.
textByHash.87adb8ecdfce16d69d1ade2fcfb73bcd00bc0c4c: T'was brillig and the slithey toathes Did gyre and gimbol in the wabe All mimsy were the borrowgroves And the mome raths outgrabe.
textByHash.99b386047aedb45bcad03da3fb067e1a470aaad6: You give me a hair-cut and then expect me to talk to you? I think not!
textByHash.9b96787acbc75e85bd74796ccc73986b039e735e: Excellent! The humans an aficionado! Make yourself comfortable and I'll begin...
textByHash.ba57212c36ef52eea78ba29086c3abf133d91639: Is the Farmer an agent for the other side?
textByHash.bb3aee2f6e2ddf00327b92870dcdee3494ffd6d1: How now foolish cow? Do you read poetry, instead of pulling a plow?
textByHash.bcdad1c5de422332049281142e77715cecd966ac: King? I thought there was a duke, not a king.
textByHash.cdf8e1822eccdcd515ad83e29a61165c39ee785f: They are lazy, good for nothing codfish addicts. GO AWAY.
textByHash.ce71b1bdc01685396083579b288624f2d0958f49: You are one clueless penguin. The outpost is the iceberg to the North. The entrance is concealed by what looks like an avalanche.
textByHash.d051ce2ae64c9fcf0a51e8d44aaa4cca36980cf0: No, no, we'll tell you. You just deal with the Farmer.
textByHash.d1eee01d724df01a2fe44fefe81fb7355a8a1319: I wish I was a cow My life would be so simple I could lie around just eating grass And wonder if I was a pimple.
textByHash.e47df6642d5d14829fae99fe47c2e916f5f93c0c: The humans found some symbols And doesn't know what they mean So now it's cross-examining me And spoiling my routine!
textByHash.e54fad71e7e01abd66c226a27a4459b362262ad5: Every two-bit soldier knows that salute. We won't give you the time of the day without the secret phrase. Now GO AWAY.
textByHash.f90bc0e30fae21caf5821a20b5c92a99ab9dff14: Twinkle, twinkle little egg Wouldn't you like to grow some legs? And run around, on grass so green arguing with the milk and cream.
